name: liquid-messenger-platform
description: Production-ready Liquid Messenger web client and Node/PostgreSQL realtime backend.

scripts.check: node --check backend/gateway/src/server.js && node --check backend/gateway/src/db.js && node --check backend/gateway/src/migrate.js && node --check backend/gateway/src/seed.js && node --check apps/web/public/app.js && node --check apps/web/public/sw.js && test -s apps/web/public/legal.html && node --check apps/web/public/extensions.js && node --check apps/web/public/plugins/core-tools/index.js && node --check apps/web/public/plugins/theme-pack/index.js && node --check apps/web/public/plugins/safe-mode-controller/index.js && node --check scripts/start-cluster.js && node --check apps/admin/public/app.js && node --check apps/desktop/src/main.js && node --check apps/desktop/src/preload.js && node --check scripts/security-audit.js && node --check app/extensions/permissions.js && node --check app/extensions/manifest.js && node --check app/core/events.js && node --check app/core/storage.js && node --check app/core/network.js && node --check app/sdk/index.js
